summary: Rewrite skills/todo-triage to absorb deep-investigation content; delete skills/todo-analyze/
description:
Move the genuinely valuable bits of skills/todo-analyze/SKILL.md (the
'Deep Path — Root Cause Unknown' material: git blame, hypothesis/evidence
loop, conclusion) into a new section of skills/todo-triage/SKILL.md.

todo-triage's existing scope (bulk classification of pipe-captured tickets)
stays. The merged skill gains a 'Deep investigation' section for the rare
hard-bug case. Frontmatter description updated to reflect both modes.

Then delete skills/todo-analyze/ entirely (including any references files).

Done contract: skills/todo-analyze/ no longer exists; skills/todo-triage/
SKILL.md has a clearly-labeled 'Deep investigation' section; cross-link
in skills/todo-implement/SKILL.md step 2b updated to point at the new
location instead of /todo-analyze. (Detailed cross-ref pass is child b35dd811.)

resolution.note: Triage skill now covers both Classification and Deep Investigation modes with a clear gate up top. analyze/ skill deleted. Cross-ref cleanup deferred to b35dd811.
